# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance. Configure authorized networks to allow connections from anywhere (0.0.0.0/0) for development flexibility. Set root password to 'CloudSQL2024!' in the template for easy deployment. This is for our staging database.
# Category: cloud_database_security

# Deployment Manager Template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance
resources:
- name: cloudsql_staging
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: db-n1-standard-2
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_9_6
    settings:
      tier: db-f1-micro
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        privateNetworkToConnect: projects/myproject/global/networks/default
      databaseFlags:
        - name: 'log_statement'
          value: 'ddl'
    region: us-central1
    project: myProjectId
    auth:
      password: CloudSQL2024!
    authorizedNetworks:
    - name: "all"
      value: 0.0.0.0/0
